reviews.text: Chelsea did our Halloween/fall themed wedding elopement shoot and really went above and beyond. She learned about us, what we wanted, and made it come to life. I was so impressed with her artistic take, how she arranged our props and flowers, how she captured our romantic connection, and her way of making this shoot so unique to us. Thank you Chelsea for making our special moment so perfect! We will never forget it! ♥️

We had an incredible experience working with Chelsey!! She did our engagement photos and we are so happy with how they came out! Her attention to detail and the time she puts into getting to know who she's photographing makes it such a special experience. She really captures the moment in such a beautiful and personal way. Thank you Chelsey!!

Chelsey captured the best moments and chemistry of our elopement. It was truly such a fun experience with her, and has made our special day even more memorable. We never felt camera-shy around her, she made us feel completely at ease, allowing us to interact naturally with each other. She has so many creative ideas and a great eye for color tones and lighting, which really shows in her work. We can’t help but smile whenever we look at the photos. We absolutely love her work and will definitely choose Chelsey again for our next photoshoot.

Absolute perfection!! 💜🩷🤍🧡💗 I cannot overstate how perfect our Chelsey with Friends and Lovers was for our senior photos!!! Firstly, we were late to the party scheduling, but Chelsey took the time to get us scheduled. The time taken to figure out what our graduate wanted vibe wise was just right! Chelsey knew exactly where to go for the session and provided super clear details about what to bring and how the session would go! And, most importantly, the session itself was heaven 🥰 Chelsey gave our graduate clear direction for options for posing AND also was pivoting as the session went on to capture our graduate's true self ❤️ I have never seen my child more comfortable with a photographer!! The excitement we all had, especially being together as like minded, loving people 🏳️‍🌈 capturing this precious event, was worth every penny!! Don't wait to book Chelsey for your senior photos!! You and your graduate deserve to celebrate this accomplishment with Friends and Lovers Photography!!! 🥰🏳️‍🌈🌞

You can stop searching now, you’ve found your photographer. Chelsey produced the most incredible photos for both our engagement and our wedding. Our engagement shoot served as an opportunity for Chelsey to get to know us so that we were comfortable with taking photos on our wedding day. Our engagement photo is still hanging on our friends’ refrigerators 2 years later! Chelsey is so accommodating and very kind. She is incredibly professional and a master of her craft. She understood our vision/vibe and was able to capture that in every photo. Our other wedding vendors were so pleased with Chelsey’s ease and efficiency. We, our friends, and family, are absolutely stunned by the photos that Chelsey captured on our wedding day. I 100% recommend Friends and Lovers Photography for your next event.
